description: Motion data exported after perceptive MPC calculation for AMP/csv2npz conversion.

fps.usage: AMP computes dt = 1 / fps for interpolation sampling.

dof_names.requirement: Must exactly match robot.data.joint_names, including order. motion_loader.get_dof_index(robot.data.joint_names) will assert on mismatch.

body_names.requirement: Used by get_body_index(reference_body) and get_body_index(key_body_names). Names must match the AMP robot body names.

dof_positions.csv_layout: First column is time, remaining columns follow dof_names.

dof_velocities.note: Exported from the MPC input trajectory. csv2npz may also recompute this from dof_positions with finite differences.

body_positions.note: Absolute world-frame positions computed with Pinocchio forward kinematics.

body_rotations.note: World-frame body orientations computed with Pinocchio forward kinematics.

robot_urdf.usage: Robot model used for Pinocchio forward kinematics and name matching.

terrain_source_image.usage: Original terrain image selected by terrain_name.

terrain_elevation.note: Height map loaded from the terrain image after applying terrain_scale and zeroing height at world origin.

terrain_filtered_elevation.note: Filtered/segmented map generated by the perception pipeline.
